extDescription.message: Replaces follower and following counts with ∞ on X (profiles, hover cards, and more).

browserActionTitle.message: X: hide follower count — counts are hidden on this site only.

followerTooltip.message: Follower count hidden by the "X: hide follower count" extension. Disable or remove the extension to see the number.

followingTooltip.message: Following count hidden by the "X: hide follower count" extension. Disable or remove the extension to see the number.
